items.title: Should You Invest $1,000 in Visa (V) Before the End of 2025?
items.description: Visa reported solid revenue and adjusted profit gains in its most recent fiscal year.

items.title: Pharrell Williams' Black Ambition Prize Competition Announced 2025 Winners at 5th Annual Demo Day
items.description: The Black Ambition 5th Annual Demo Day & Fundable Founders Forum was held at The Sacred Space Miami on Friday, November 14th, and Saturday, November 15, 2025. Under the banner of "Celebrating Innovation, Impact, and Ambition," these events brought together a powerful ecosystem of investment, ambition, and community. These landmark events were designed to be a launching pad for underrepresented founders rewriting the future of business, culture, and purpose.

items.title: Tracking Jeremy Grantham's GMO Capital Portfolio - Q3 2025 Update
items.description: GMO's Q3 2025 13F portfolio rose to $35.46B, with Microsoft, Alphabet, Meta, Apple, and Lam Research as top holdings. Learn more about the portfolio here.

items.title: TY: A Solid Hybrid CEF, But AI Concerns Might Be Headwinds
items.description: Tri-Continental Corporation (TY) offers a hybrid portfolio of equities and bonds, targeting long-term capital growth and current income for investors. Read the full analysis here.

items.title: Is RS2's New Visa Status a Game-Changer for Europe's Card Market?
items.description: V's new partnership elevates Beyond by RS2 to Principal Issuing Member, unlocking direct card issuance and broader payment capabilities across Europe.
